name: ptm_site_matrix
description: Site-by-sample PTM matrix plus sample metadata converted into one or more contrast-specific gene programs and GMT gene sets

inputs.name: ptm_matrix_tsv
inputs.description: Wide PTM matrix with one row per site and one column per sample

inputs.name: protein_matrix_tsv
inputs.description: Optional matched protein matrix with the same sample columns

parameters.name: signature_name
parameters.help: Optional signature label for metadata/GMT naming; default uses ptm_matrix_tsv stem

parameters.name: dataset_label
parameters.help: Optional dataset label for run summaries; default uses input filename

parameters.name: ptm_type
parameters.help: PTM class used for canonical site keys and bundle defaults

parameters.name: matrix_format
parameters.help: Input PTM matrix layout

parameters.name: sample_id_column
parameters.help: Sample id column in sample_metadata_tsv

parameters.name: group_column
parameters.help: Grouping column for grouped contrasts

parameters.name: condition_column
parameters.help: Condition column for case-control contrasts

parameters.name: study_contrast
parameters.help: Study-design contrast estimated from the PTM matrix

parameters.name: condition_a
parameters.help: Condition A label for condition_a_vs_b or condition_within_group

parameters.name: condition_b
parameters.help: Condition B label for condition_a_vs_b or condition_within_group

parameters.name: min_samples_per_condition
parameters.help: Minimum samples per side to estimate a site-level contrast

parameters.name: effect_metric
parameters.help: Per-site contrast metric estimated from the matrix

parameters.name: missing_value_policy
parameters.help: How missing site values are handled across compared samples

parameters.name: min_present_per_condition
parameters.help: Minimum non-missing values per side when missing_value_policy=min_present

parameters.name: site_id_column
parameters.help: Optional stable site identifier column override

parameters.name: site_group_column
parameters.help: Optional site-group identifier column override

parameters.name: gene_id_column
parameters.help: Optional gene_id column override

parameters.name: gene_symbol_column
parameters.help: Optional gene_symbol column override

parameters.name: protein_accession_column
parameters.help: Optional protein accession column override

parameters.name: residue_column
parameters.help: Optional residue column override

parameters.name: position_column
parameters.help: Optional residue position column override

parameters.name: score_column
parameters.help: Unused for standard matrix mode; included for downstream scorer compatibility

parameters.name: stat_column
parameters.help: Column name written for site-level matrix statistics

parameters.name: logfc_column
parameters.help: Column name written for site-level mean differences

parameters.name: padj_column
parameters.help: Column name written for adjusted p-values if available

parameters.name: pvalue_column
parameters.help: Column name written for approximate p-values

parameters.name: localization_prob_column
parameters.help: Localization confidence column in the PTM matrix

parameters.name: peptide_count_column
parameters.help: Peptide/evidence count column in the PTM matrix

parameters.name: protein_logfc_column
parameters.help: Matched protein contrast column injected into per-site rows

parameters.name: protein_stat_column
parameters.help: Matched protein statistic column injected into per-site rows

parameters.name: score_mode
parameters.help: Downstream site-score definition after matrix contrast estimation

parameters.name: score_transform
parameters.help: Signed or nonnegative row-score transform

parameters.name: protein_adjustment
parameters.help: Adjust site scores by matched total-protein contrast

parameters.name: protein_adjustment_lambda
parameters.help: Coefficient for protein_adjustment=subtract

parameters.name: confidence_weight_mode
parameters.help: Confidence weighting strategy

parameters.name: min_localization_prob
parameters.help: Minimum localization probability contributing positive weight

parameters.name: site_dup_policy
parameters.help: Duplicate-row collapse policy per canonical site

parameters.name: gene_aggregation
parameters.help: Site-to-gene aggregation method

parameters.name: gene_topk_sites
parameters.help: K for gene_aggregation=signed_topk_mean

parameters.name: ambiguous_gene_policy
parameters.help: How ambiguous multi-gene rows are handled

parameters.name: neglog10p_cap
parameters.help: Cap for -log10(p) in logfc_times_neglog10p mode

parameters.name: neglog10p_eps
parameters.help: Numerical floor for p-values

parameters.name: resources_manifest
parameters.help: Optional resources manifest path

parameters.name: resources_dir
parameters.help: Optional resources directory containing PTM bundle files

parameters.name: resource_policy
parameters.help: Behavior when requested PTM resources are missing

parameters.name: use_reference_bundle
parameters.help: Attempt to use alias and ubiquity priors when available

parameters.name: site_alias_resource_id
parameters.help: Optional resource id for canonical site alias table

parameters.name: site_ubiquity_resource_id
parameters.help: Optional resource id for site ubiquity prior

parameters.name: select
parameters.help: Gene selection method using abs(score)

parameters.name: top_k
parameters.help: K for select=top_k

parameters.name: quantile
parameters.help: Fraction for select=quantile

parameters.name: min_score
parameters.help: Minimum abs(score) for select=threshold

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.help: Weight normalization on selected genes

parameters.name: emit_full
parameters.help: Write geneset.full.tsv

parameters.name: emit_gmt
parameters.help: Write genesets.gmt

parameters.name: gmt_format
parameters.help: GMT serialization format

parameters.name: gmt_prefer_symbol
parameters.help: Prefer gene_symbol tokens in GMT

parameters.name: gmt_require_symbol
parameters.help: Drop rows without usable symbol tokens for GMT

parameters.name: gmt_biotype_allowlist
parameters.help: Comma-separated allowed biotypes for GMT

parameters.name: gmt_split_signed
parameters.help: Emit __pos and __neg GMT families from signed scores

parameters.name: gmt_topk_list
parameters.help: Comma-separated top-K GMT plans

parameters.name: gmt_mass_list
parameters.help: Comma-separated mass GMT plans

parameters.name: gmt_min_genes
parameters.help: Minimum genes per GMT set

parameters.name: gmt_max_genes
parameters.help: Maximum genes per GMT set

parameters.name: emit_small_gene_sets
parameters.help: Emit sets below gmt_min_genes with warning

outputs.name: geneset.tsv
outputs.description: Selected PTM-derived gene program for a single contrast

outputs.name: geneset.meta.json
outputs.description: Run metadata and provenance for a single contrast

outputs.name: geneset.full.tsv
outputs.description: Full ranked PTM-derived gene score table (optional)

outputs.name: manifest.tsv
outputs.description: Contrast-to-output-path mapping for grouped matrix runs

outputs.name: contrast_qc.tsv
outputs.description: Per-contrast QC summary including skipped reasons
